head: 0x00
notes: Normal timing record family selected when VV62=0; first record starts at 700F because table byte 1 is index 04h.

head: 0x0B
notes: Alternate timing record family selected through 7001 pointer table when VV62 selects base 7088h; ESC J/ESC j command feed sets VV62=1 and VV63=0 at 56B9-56BCh, so this is the currently traced command-feed record. Head byte 0x0B is also used as the command-feed short-move threshold; fields VV4C=05 and VV54=05 are subtracted for the normal count>=0x0B path, giving EF64=count-10. Final PB2 release uses VV37=20h, which selects EF60 outside this EF49..EF5F record copy; EF60 remains 00h and drives the 5498h hold branch.
